headline: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
summary: Meta prototypes "super sensing" smart glasses. They'd continuously record audio and snap photos. Wearers could ask Meta AI about captured data.

headline: Get a $30 credit when you reserve Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy phones
summary: Reserve Samsung's unannounced Galaxy phones now. Get a $30 credit for preorders. Next Galaxy Unpacked event is July 22nd, 2026.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
summary: Microsoft's Xbox reset causes studio changes. Obsidian Entertainment shifts to a new Fallout title. Multiple projects, including Avowed, were canceled.

headline: America’s cheapest new EV is smaller than a ping-pong table and tops out at 19mph
summary: Fiat Topolino is America's most affordable EV. It's tiny, even smaller than a ping-pong table. Top speed is limited to 19mph.

headline: id Software Was Reportedly 'Toying With' Pitches for a New Perfect Dark, a John Wick-Inspired Game, and More Before Layoffs
summary: id Software explored new game ideas. Pitches included a Perfect Dark title. A John Wick-inspired game was also considered before layoffs.

headline: College Football 27 Review
summary: College Football 27 review is live. The game's junior year starts strong. Find out if it's a touchdown or a fumble.

headline: You Can Still Save 34% off the Garmin Forerunner 265 Smartwatch at AliExpress
summary: Score 34% off the Garmin Forerunner 265. This smartwatch deal is available at AliExpress. Don't miss out on these savings.

headline: Dell Outlet Has a Refurb Alienware 18 Area-51 RTX 5070 Ti Gaming Laptop for $2013
summary: Dell Outlet offers a refurbished Alienware 18. Get an Area-51 RTX 5070 Ti gaming laptop. It comes with a 1-year warranty for $2013.

headline: US launches more strikes on Iran with blasts reported in south of country
summary: US launches new strikes against Iran. Blasts reported in southern Iran. Trump cites "retribution" for ship bombing.

headline: Jackdaw boss warns of winter fuel shortages if gas field not approved
summary: Jackdaw boss warns of UK fuel shortages. Urgent approval for North Sea gas is needed. Adura cites risk of domestic supply issues.

headline: UK heatwave spreads further north and west as temperatures continue to climb
summary: UK heatwave expands across the country. Temperatures are still rising. This is one of the longest heatwaves since 1976.

headline: Met investigate donation to Jenrick's Tory leadership campaign
summary: Met Police investigate a donation. Focus is on Jenrick's Tory leadership campaign. Jenrick calls allegations "entirely false".
